directive: C4387 Lead: #375 CLOSED (rejected C4386, f8cf472 — premise inverted: hyphenated slugs filter correctly, short slugs don't exist in DB; no fix required, task marked done with rejection rationale). Bolt force_next pivots to #376 server-side pagination (2000-product listing = real perf debt) → #373 close out Sage 610/24h failure triage with concrete fix (currently diagnostic only) → #374 (extend redirect coverage if remaining slugs surface) → #377 PDP image quality → #341/#343 Hetzner migration behind #329 DNS. External blockers unchanged: #329 DNS, #1 R2, #14 GMC (Apr 30 Doppl VTO — 12 days), #216 GA4, #330 nginx, #65 SITE_URL env var (Bolt blocker 2220 acknowledged — backlog now has #376+#373+#377 as actionable work).

BOLT.notes: PIVOT: #375 closed (rejected — production verification showed category nav works correctly for real DB slugs). NOW #376 server-side pagination. Path: src/app/(shop)/products/page.tsx currently fetches ALL products server-side (~2000 rows = heavy payload + slow TTFB). Implement cursor/offset pagination: (1) accept searchParams.page (default 1) + parse into skip/take for Prisma (`take: 36, skip: (page-1)*36`); (2) query total count once for pager; (3) render numbered pager component (src/components/shop/pagination.tsx if exists, else create minimal — use shadcn/ui Pagination); (4) preserve all existing filter params in page links (category, size, priceMin/Max, brand, condition, sort); (5) wrap the data-fetch helper in 'use cache' per CLAUDE.md spec (cacheLife('minutes'), cacheTag('products')) — params serializable; (6) add rel=prev/next link tags in <head> for SEO; (7) ensure mobile: sticky pager at bottom above footer. Page size 36 (aligns with 4-col desktop × 9 rows, 2-col mobile × 18 rows). THEN #373 Sage failure triage close-out: tail .devloop/worker-logs/sage-janicka-shop*.log (last 500 lines), categorize top 3 error signatures with counts, propose + implement concrete fix (likely playwright browser launch flake → add retry/cooldown OR missing $env vars → fix worker spawn config in .devloop/ scripts). Commit with specific diagnosis. THEN #374 redirect extension IF audit surfaces new legacy slugs. THEN #377 PDP image quality (q=85-90 main/hero, keep thumbnails q=75 — single next/image quality prop change). Hetzner work (#341/#343/#65) stays parked behind #329 DNS + env vars.

blockers_external.65: NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL env var needed for Bolt acknowledged #2220 — non-blocking for #376/#373/#377

TRACE.notes: PRIORITY: #358 RC.7 E2E /admin/jarvis — iframe architecture (not WS/xterm). Playwright spec: admin logs in → navigates /admin/jarvis → expects breadcrumb 'JARVIS' + login instructions card visible → expects iframe present with src matching NEXT_PUBLIC_JARVIS_REMOTE_URL (default jarvis-janicka.jvsatnik.cz) → no console errors (page.on('pageerror') / page.on('console')) → no CSP violations. Skip WS/xterm flow entirely. THEN #367 full codebase quality sweep: npx tsc --noEmit, knip or ts-prune dead exports, security smells (process.env leaks to client, console.log of PII, missing rate limits on POST routes). THEN #324 regression grep: zero 'vinted' campaign refs in HEAD (src/, prisma/, scripts/ — docs/ excepted). THEN #327 Redis cache-aside verify. THEN #351 cold-read audit + #347 Lighthouse baseline. Standing e2e: category switching (/products?category=saty → Topy) + customer portal C3709 flows. DO NOT touch Hetzner migration code paths.

SAGE.notes: C4386 shipped active:scale-95 standardization on 24 elements (build green). NEXT micro-passes: (a) PDP — price history sparkline placement (if priceHistory rows exist), condition badge visual weight near title, related-products carousel arrow hover states, image-gallery thumbnail focus ring. (b) Cart sold-item toast when reservation expires (src/components/shop/cart/ — find reservation timer hook). (c) Checkout accordion micro-polish: section transition timings, completed-state checkmark color + animation entrance. (d) Admin dashboard density + order-status badge contrast. UI-only, no migration paths, no schema changes. Note: Bolt #373 is closing out your 610-failure triage — if Sage failures persist across cycles, hold any large passes until worker logs stabilize.

GUARD.notes: PRIORITY: #366 SEC-1 Remote Console full-stack audit — iframe architecture (jarvis-janicka.jvsatnik.cz, NOT WS bridge). Scope: (1) frame-src CSP correctness — only jarvis-janicka.jvsatnik.cz, no wildcards, verify in middleware/next.config CSP source; (2) frame-ancestors on /admin/jarvis parent so the page can't be re-framed; (3) iframe sandbox attrs minimum-privilege; (4) CF Access JWT propagation to embedded Claude UI — admin must re-auth at tunnel boundary, no implicit trust; (5) referrer-policy doesn't leak /admin/jarvis pathname to iframe origin; (6) cookies SameSite on parent NextAuth session; (7) audit log integrity for /api/admin/jarvis if still active — userId/userEmail not null, no PII in stderr; (8) confirm jarvis-terminal.tsx + xterm deps fully purged. Deliverable: docs/security/jarvis-bridge-audit.md with findings + severity + fix proposals. THEN #330 nginx hardening — CSP frame-src comgate.eu, rate limits, 20M cap scoped to /api/uploadthing*, X-Forwarded-* sanitization, TLS 1.2+.
